description: We work with further education (FE) colleges to improve their quality and financial resilience and with local authorities delivering further education. Further Education Commissioner is part of the Department for Education .

details.body:
We work with further education (FE) colleges to improve their quality and financial resilience and with local authorities delivering further education.

Further Education Commissioner is part of the Department for Education.

The FE Commissioner works with FE colleges to help improve the quality and sustainability of their provision, and reduce the risk of failure. This includes providing support to colleges in formal intervention, preventing colleges from falling into formal intervention and contributing to policy development for colleges in the FE sector.

More information is available in the college and oversight support and intervention guide.

The Deputy FE Commissioners work with FE colleges to help improve the quality and sustainability of their provision, and reduce the risk of failure. This includes:

  • providing support to colleges in intervention
  • preventing colleges from going into intervention
  • contributing to policy development for colleges in the FE sector

More information is available in the college oversight: support and intervention guide.
